query: Can I sue my employer for unpaid wages after being terminated without notice?
expected_cases: Food Corporation of India v. Ramesh Kumar (1994) 2 SCC 414
key_facts: 15 days pay per year retrenchment compensation

query: Is a non-compete clause in my employment contract enforceable in India after I resign?
expected_cases: Niranjan Shankar Golikari v. Century Spinning AIR 1967 SC 1098

query: My employer denied my maternity leave and threatened to terminate me. What are my rights?
expected_cases: Air India v. Nargesh Meerza AIR 1981 SC 1829

query: Can my employer deduct money from my salary without my consent for alleged damages?
expected_cases: Central Bank of India v. S. Satyam (1996) 5 SCC 419

query: I worked for a company for 4 years and was retrenched. How much compensation am I entitled to?
expected_cases: Guest Keen Williams v. P.J. Sterling AIR 1959 SC 1151
key_facts: 15 days average pay per completed year
one month notice or pay in lieu

query: I am a contract worker. Can I claim permanent employment from the principal employer?
expected_statutes: Contract Labour (Regulation and Abolition) Act 1970 S.10

query: My employer is paying me below minimum wages. What can I do?
expected_cases: Randhir Singh v. Union of India AIR 1982 SC 879

query: My employer dismissed me for misconduct without holding a domestic inquiry. Is this valid?
expected_cases: Bharat Forge v. Uttam Manohar Nakate (2005) 2 SCC 489
Workmen of Firestone Tyre v. Management AIR 1973 SC 1227

query: I was illegally dismissed. Can I get full back wages along with reinstatement?
expected_cases: Hindustan Tin Works v. Employees AIR 1979 SC 75
Surendra Kumar Verma v. Central Govt. Tribunal (1980) 4 SCC 443
key_facts: burden on employer to show gainful employment

query: I am a manager. Can I raise an industrial dispute for my termination?
expected_cases: Delhi Cloth and General Mills v. Shambhu Nath Mukherjee AIR 1978 SC 8

query: My employer has 150 workers and wants to close down. Do they need government permission?
key_facts: 100 or more workers require government permission

query: Does the Code on Wages 2019 apply to me? My employer says it replaces the Payment of Wages Act.
key_facts: commencement not notified in most states
Payment of Wages Act still in force

query: I worked 220 days last year as a seasonal worker. Am I entitled to retrenchment compensation?
expected_cases: Guest Keen Williams v. P.J. Sterling AIR 1959 SC 1151

query: Can I get equal pay as a permanent employee if I am doing the same work as a contract worker?
expected_cases: Randhir Singh v. Union of India AIR 1982 SC 879

query: My company wants me to sign a bond saying I will not join a competitor for 2 years after leaving. Should I sign?
expected_cases: Niranjan Shankar Golikari v. Century Spinning AIR 1967 SC 1098
Percept D Mark v. Zaheer Khan AIR 2006 Bombay 390
key_facts: cannot be enforced in Indian courts
confidential info clause may be valid
